details.test: Task 1: Bookmark highest-rated sustainable residential project completed after 2020
Task 2: Select most-awarded project under 10,000 sqm and mark as top choice
Task 3: Register a firm for 2026 International Residential Award with early-bird entry
Task 4: Create viewing list of projects from different continents
Task 5: Cast People's Choice votes for up to three projects matching filters
Task 6: Add student competition with mid-range prize in October 2025 to watchlist
Task 7: Subscribe to monthly newsletter with Sustainability and Residential topics
Task 8: Shortlist two award-recognized residential projects within year and floor constraints
